title: Bettina Wooden Iron Scrubbing Scrub Hard Stiff Bristle Brush Floor Tile Decking Cleaning (one brush)
features: Hard stiff bristles to remove dirt and grime.
Great for hard floors, tiles, decking and much more.
description: This wooden scrub brush is just what you need for a little extra help when removing unwanted tough stains and solid dirty off surfaces. Ensure that you are getting the best cleaning results with this durable wooden brush. Designed with hard stiff bristles, this scrubbing brush is sure to keep your hard flooring, tiles and decking looking fresh and clean. As this wooden iron scrub brush is durable and handy, it makes a perfect cleaning equipment for any home.
